title: Opening for Software Engineer at Cropin Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Cropin Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Cropin Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Cropin Asia Pacific Associates:
Cropin Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cropin Asia Pacific Associates!
